title: Report on the proposed network subsidy to Post Office Limited by the Department for Business and Trade
body: "The SAU has published its report providing advice to DBT regarding its proposed network subsidy to POL.  The report sets out the SAU’s evaluation of DBT’s Assessment of Compliance of the proposed subsidy with the requirements set out in the Subsidy Control Act 2022.  For more information, visit the Referral of the proposed network subsidy to Post Office Limited by the Department for Business and Trade case page. "
